basic_details.job_title: NCBS Administrative Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Centre for Biological Sciences (NCBS) Administrative Officer 'C' (Purchase and Stores) Notification 2026 has been released on 15 June 2026 on the official website ncbs.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NCBS Administrative Officer 'C' (Purchase and Stores) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: As per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate from a recognised University/Institute with aggregate of 60% marks, Diploma/Degree/Certificate course in Management or Administration from a recognised University/Institute, Proficiency in use of personal computers and applications, 5 years’ service in Level 6 and /or Level 7 and /or Level 8 or with equivalent TME (total monthly emolument)
qualification.details: Graduate from a recognised University/Institute with aggregate of 60% marks. Diploma/Degree/Certificate course in Management or Administration from a recognised University/Institute. Proficiency in use of personal computers and applications. 5 years’ service in Level 6 and /or Level 7 and /or Level 8 or with equivalent TME (total monthly emolument).

salary_details.details: Level 10 (stage-1) Basic Pay: Rs. 56,100/- + allowances as per Central Government norms.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NCBS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NCBS Administrative Officer 'C' post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NCBS Administrative Officer 'C' (Purchase and Stores) post is 20th July 2026. Ensure you complete the process before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification is a Graduate degree from a recognised University/Institute with at least 60% marks, along with a Diploma/Degree/Certificate in Management or Administration.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Administrative Officer 'C' post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Administrative Officer 'C' (Purchase and Stores) position in the National Centre for Biological Sciences.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Administrative Officer 'C' post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 56,100 per month, which is Level 10 (stage-1) Basic Pay, plus applicable allowances.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: For General and OBC category candidates, the application fee is Rs. 1,000/-. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test, followed by a Skill Test, and finally an Interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: Yes, the recruitment for the Administrative Officer 'C' (Purchase and Stores) post is for a permanent position at the National Centre for Biological Sciences.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official website of NCBS or via the direct 'Apply Online' link provided in the 'Important Links' section. Ensure all details are correct and documents are uploaded as required.
